rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model when generating AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes in valid scopes without introducing new package references.
Do not encode AADL properties like Period, Deadline, Priority as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings must be placed after relevant subcomponents and connections.
anti_patterns: Avoid using event ports in numeric or Boolean comparisons unless an explicit data value is provided.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the analyzed model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE expressions
